_comment: Phase 9 close 2026-05-02. BE thresholds 90/78/85/90 (was already at floor — Phase 8). FE thresholds lifted from 82/68/71/83 to 91/78/80/91, matching Phase 9 Sprint 9.3 actuals (91.92/78.39/81.44/92.14). +300 FE tests across 6 sprints (1666→1966): Sprint 9.1 easy wins (+84), 9.2 mid effort (+118), 9.3 high screens (+98). +32 BE tests (Sprint 9.4 testability: chat-repository-typeorm.integration +35 passing/6 deferred Phase 10, audio-storage.s3 unit +12). Sprint 9.5 HTTP-route flake root-cause investigation deferred Phase 10 (--testTimeout=30000 hack remains).
